title: PartnerMcp
description: Curated federated MCP partner row (Wave 51 dim R). jpcite acts as hub and recommends one of these partners when an agent query falls outside jpcite's Japanese-public-program scope. NO LLM inference involved — partner selection is deterministic keyword/capability match. NO HTTP call at recommendation time — the agent client calls the partner directly.

partner_id.description: Stable short slug for the partner (lowercase, ascii, no spaces). Used as the canonical join key with am_federated_mcp_partner.partner_id (migration 278).
partner_id.title: Partner Id

name.description: Display name (may contain Japanese / English / spaces). Surfaced verbatim to agents in recommendation envelopes.
name.title: Name

official_url.description: Canonical first-party developer-portal / product URL for the partner. ALWAYS https. Used for human verification of the recommendation surface.
official_url.title: Official Url

mcp_endpoint.description: Official partner-operated MCP server endpoint when one exists, otherwise null. NEVER a third-party aggregator endpoint — only first-party-confirmed MCP URLs.
mcp_endpoint.title: Mcp Endpoint

mcp_endpoint_status.description: Disposition of mcp_endpoint. official = first-party hosted MCP confirmed via partner docs. none_official = partner has no public MCP yet, fall back to REST/GraphQL via official_url.
mcp_endpoint_status.title: Mcp Endpoint Status

capabilities.description: Capability tags describing what the partner MCP / API can do. Used by gap-matching keyword lookup. Lowercase ascii tokens.
capabilities.title: Capabilities

use_when.description: One-sentence guidance (English) telling an agent when to hand off to this partner. Shown verbatim in recommendation envelopes.
use_when.title: Use When
